scripts.qa:check: npm run quality:check && npm run data:check && npm run interaction:check && npm run render:check
scripts.verify:deps: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['node_modules/.bin/vite','node_modules/@vitejs/plugin-react']) { if (!fs.existsSync(p)) { console.error('missing '+p); process.exit(1); } } console.log('vite dependency ready')"
scripts.deploy:check: npm run verify:deps && npm run actions:check && npm run gemini:check && npm run data:check && npm run validate:data && npm run quality:check && npm run runtime-ui:check && npm run interaction:check && npm run render:check && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.generate:all: npm run update:data && npm run update:news && npm run generate:report
